title: podolobium procumbens
intro: Podolobium procumbens, also known as Golden Pea Bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with the roots being used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Podolobium procumbens include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial for reducing pain and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture and is often used to treat gastrointestinal issues, fever, and respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
